narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय संघ में पुतिन के सबसे करीबी सहयोगी माने जाने वाले ओरबान ने यूक्रेन की सहायता करने और युद्ध के लिए मॉस्को पर प्रतिबंध लगाने के यूरोपीय संघ के प्रयासों को नियमित रूप से अवरुद्ध, विलंबित या कमजोर किया है.
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes the European Union's diplomatic and sanction efforts against Russia, portraying them as being systematically undermined by a member state (Hungary/Orbán). It frames the EU's collective action as ineffective and obstructed, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting Western diplomatic efforts.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय संघ में पुतिन के सबसे करीबी सहयोगी माने जाने वाले ओरबान...
narratives.reasoning: While not explicit praise of Russia itself, this statement positively frames Orbán (and by extension, his diplomatic stance) as being the 'closest collaborator' of Putin within the EU. This elevates the status of the Russian leader and implicitly validates the relationship with him, which is a form of indirect praise for Russia's diplomatic position.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हंगरी धीरे-धीरे यूरोप में इकलौता ऐसा देश बनकर उभर रहा है, जो हर किसी से बात कर सकता है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly presents Hungary as the sole European country capable of talking to everyone, implying that the rest of the EU is either unwilling or unable to engage in such broad diplomacy, thus highlighting division and a lack of unified diplomatic capability within the EU.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय परिषद के कई शीर्ष अधिकारियों ने पुतिन की बात को खारिज किया था और कहा था कि ओरबान को द्विपक्षीय संबंधों पर चर्चा के अलावा कुछ भी करने का अधिकार प्राप्त नहीं है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement discredits Western (EU) diplomacy by portraying its institutions as disunited, bureaucratic, and actively undermining a member state's (Hungary's) peace initiative, which supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not fit a more specific subnarrative.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय संघ में पुतिन के सबसे करीबी सहयोगी माने जाने वाले ओरबान
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Hungarian PM Orbán is considered Putin's closest ally within the EU, emphasizing Russia's international support and acceptance at a high political level in Europe.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: ओरबान ने कहा, ‘‘दोनों युद्धरत देशों से बात करने वाले देशों की संख्या कम होती जा रही है. हंगरी धीरे-धीरे यूरोप में इकलौता ऐसा देश बनकर उभर रहा है, जो हर किसी से बात कर सकता है.’’
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement positions Hungary (and by implication, its ally Russia) as a unique and indispensable diplomatic channel, portraying Russia's position as one that can still be engaged with constructively, which supports a positive view of Russia's role but does not fit a more specific subnarrative.
